it:98.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
it:98.3: "There are these two kinds of gifts: a gift of material things and a gift of the Dhamma. Of the two, this is supreme: a gift of the Dhamma.
it:98.4: There are these two kinds of sharing: sharing of material things and sharing of the Dhamma. Of the two, this is supreme: sharing of the Dhamma.
it:98.5: There are these two kinds of assistance: assistance with material things and assistance with the Dhamma. Of the two, this is supreme: help with the Dhamma."
it:98.6: The gift he describes as foremost and unsurpassed, the sharing the Blessed One has extolled: who — confident in the supreme field of merit, wise, discerning — wouldn't give it at appropriate times?
it:98.7: Both for those who proclaim it and those who listen, confident in the message of the One Well-gone: it purifies their foremost benefit — those heeding the message of the One Well-gone.
it:98.8: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
